data.status: closing is doors at the end of June
data.short_description: Dad's Doughs will be closing its mini-doughnut shop in the former Town Garage building. The shop opened in November 2024 and sold fresh-made mini doughnuts, drip coffee, and beverages while supporting local brands. They invite customers to visit until the end of June.

Bliss Matcha & Beyond is coming to the former Boost Bowls location. The menu features matcha lattes, matcha soft serve, matcha tiramisu, bubble tea, cheese cloud latte, desserts, and more. This will be their second location after New Haven.

data.location: The Shops at Stone Bridge, 1991 Highland Avenue in Cheshire
data.short_description: Blu Pointe Prime Steakhouse & Seafood is coming to The Shops at Stone Bridge according to permit filings. It will offer Prime and Wagyu beef, fresh seafood, craft cocktails, and a patio with fireplace. It replaces the previously listed Market Place Kitchen.
A new sandwich shop is proposed for the former Stacy's Cleaners building at 55 White Avenue with interior seating for 30. Plans are subject to local approvals.
Tony Phở Restaurant is proposed at 51 Prospect Street specializing in pho, Bánh mì, rice dishes, egg rolls, and Vietnamese items with seating for 36. Plans are subject to local approvals.

data.status: coming soon... A fall opening is planned
data.short_description: Ross Dress for Less is coming to replace Joann Fabrics in the renamed Ross Plaza. It will occupy 24,890 square feet as their first Hartford County location.

Crunch & Flame is coming to the former Rooster's Chicken & Waffles space. The fast-casual concept will feature Caribbean flavors, Island Bowls, jerk chicken, fried fish, and American favorites. No timeline announced.
Pandora is coming soon to the second level next to Zumiez, occupying roughly 1,200 square feet.
JD Sports is coming soon to the second level in the former Victoria's Secret space, replacing Finish Line.

data.status: will be opening a new location
data.short_description: The Bristol Bazaar is opening a new artisan marketplace location on the second level in the former Abercrombie space with a campground theme.

Ortigia Ristorante is proposed for the historic Chester Buckley House at 184 Main Street. It would serve Sicilian cuisine and Southern-Italian favorites with lunch, dinner, patio, and events. Subject to local approvals.

data.status: up for lease ahead of closure
data.short_description: The ConnectiCare building is up for lease as the company winds down operations. They are anticipated to move out ahead of November 2026.
The Portrait at North Crossing apartment complex is now leasing with studio units starting at $1,750. It features resort-style amenities including pool, rooftop terrace, fitness spaces, and more.

data.status: will officially open its doors on May 9th at 10am
data.short_description: Papa's Loca will open on May 9th with free samples and music. It specializes in massive stuffed baked potatoes with 15 varieties plus empanadas, potato balls, and breakfast items.

data.store_name: The Marquee on State Street (restaurant & speakeasy)
data.status: planning a new restaurant and speakeasy
data.short_description: The Marquee on State Street is planning a restaurant and speakeasy at the former DEVS / Nico's space with seating, a stage, live entertainment, and amplified music (subject to permit).
